title: Link to item column not shown to guests

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys!
My guests wont see the link to item column in a specific board which has one. Could that maybe come because I have some restricted columns in the board that is linked via the Link to item column?

Thanks in advance.

Eltjo

posts.author: Jaewoo (Jaewoo Kim)
posts.cookedHtml: I have same issue. Is there a way for the linked items to show to guests without having to invite every single guests to the other board?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: At the moment, this is the way it works but we have already posted this as a requested improvement to the feature. It’s being considered so we’ll let you know if the change is made

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Julia for letting us know

posts.author: KirstyCoaching (Kirsty McWilliam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there - any update on this?
Thanks
Kirsty
